familyRules: Spouse any age; children under 18; dependent children 18-30 with sworn affidavit; children 18+ with disability if fully supported; parents/grandparents over 55 if fully supported; parents/grandparents under 55 if fully supported (+USD 50,000); siblings 18+ single childless (+USD 75,000); newborns within 12 months of approval may be added within 6 months of birth.

routes.name: National Transformation Fund (NTF) donation
routes.notes: Main + up to 3 dependants covered by the USD 275,275 all-in.

routes.name: Approved real estate
routes.notes: Real estate minimum USD 350,000 sole / USD 270,000 per share (shared). + USD 50,000 government contribution. 5-year hold before resale. All-in not quoted statically.
